scope: Preserve the complete S02 rollback proof while repairing its planner-ratified executable-proof boundary: validate the immutable amendment record and schema, admit only its two exact S19 spec transitions, and admit the rendered index only when an isolated current-head render byte-matches it.

reachability.evidence: The executable proof/check-rollback.sh runs from the assigned T1 worktree against the pinned commit 4b38887e666f7e4ab664bac4780535b080ad54eb, derives its complete first-parent provenance envelope directly from Git, proves 37 exact baseline blobs and eight exact absences, validates the pinned amendment record through its schema, and reproduces the committed index only from a disposable detached current-head render. It exits 0 only when preserved S02/S20 lifecycle state remains valid. ./bin/sworn capabilities additionally exercised the built public CLI successfully.

delivered.item: AC-01 and AC-02: dynamically derived the complete 45-path ordinary semantic envelope and restored every member mode-for-mode and blob-for-blob to S02 start tree c57285e3f652e5f49aa8bb15e3ba65249b4a3db8, including eight absences.

AC-03: live disposable Git objects fail closed for arbitrary index render drift, an arbitrary post-start S19 spec blob, amendment-record tamper, mode/blob drift, a surviving S02-added path, later ordinary authority, parent-two merge drift, authored/merge overlap, a weakened S20 record, and absent fresh-verifier evidence.

AC-04: kept S02's release records byte-identical after the S19 start checkpoint, retained the original S19 lifecycle/proof allowlist, admitted only the two planner-declared S19 spec transitions with exact provenance, and admitted index.md only after a detached current-head sworn render byte comparison.

Captain pin 1: persisted one schema-valid Implementer maintainability PASS whose report blob, review scope, status ledger, and implementation_head all bind to 4b38887e666f7e4ab664bac4780535b080ad54eb.
AC-05 precondition enforcement: retained S02 as the rollback-backed terminal deferral and retained S20 in planned/pending state until a fresh verifier supplies independent PASS evidence.
The deterministic proof-bundle first pass passes through the installed supported verify interface without invoking an agentic verifier.

not_delivered.item: Independent fresh Verifier PASS and the resulting S20 unlock.
not_delivered.why: Rule 7 assigns adversarial verification to a separate fresh-context /verify-slice session; the Implementer must stop at implemented and cannot certify this work.
not_delivered.tracking: S19-s02-v015-rollback fresh verification gate before S20-v015-parity-portable-fixture

divergence.description: The role prompt's positional proof-gate form, `sworn verify <slice-id> <release>`, is not supported by the installed CLI: it ignores positional values and blocks on a missing spec path. The same deterministic first pass was run through the installed flag interface with the S19 spec, proof, and non-empty live diff, and returned PASS. No agentic verifier was invoked or self-certified.

`sworn lint coverage --slice S19-s02-v015-rollback --release 2026-07-15-baton-v0.15-conformance --base 640396fa8cc319229d6f96dedfdbef65dbe317fe --json` exited 2 because its generic scanner tried to open the intentionally absent `internal/baton/install_transaction_test.go`. AC-02 and AC-04, the ratified contract amendment, and its explicit prohibition on persistent non-release harnesses make restoring or replacing that path impermissible. The contract-owned executable integration proof is check-rollback.sh; this is recorded as a tool-boundary divergence, not bypassed or weakened.
